summary: Completed frontend testing of The Dabba customer portal UI changes. All requested features are working correctly: delivery tracking card on home page, Today/Tomorrow meal tabs, quick links moved to Profile page, and bottom tab bar correctly shows only Home/Plans/Profile.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper React Native patterns
Delivery tracking card shows correct status progression with visual steps
Quick links correctly moved from home page to Profile page
Tab bar layout properly hides Menu/Wallet tabs using href: null
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer portal UI tested. All features working: login flow, delivery tracking card with progress steps, Today/Tomorrow meal tabs with skip functionality, Profile page quick links (Weekly Menu, Wallet, Support), bottom tab bar only shows Home/Plans/Profile.

customer_login.details: Login with test2@dabba.com / test123 works correctly. User navigates to customer home page after successful login.

delivery_tracking_card.details: Delivery tracking card shows on home page with: 'Scheduled for Today' status, 'Delivery at 4:00 PM' time, progress steps (Ordered → Preparing → On Way → Delivered)

today_tomorrow_tabs.details: Today/Tomorrow tabs visible and functional. Tab switching updates meal information correctly. Today shows 'Paneer Butter Masala' (Mar 8), Tomorrow shows 'Chole Bhature' (Mar 9) with Skip button.

quick_actions_removed_from_home.details: 'Quick Actions' section (Weekly Menu, Wallet, Support) is NOT present on home page as requested.

profile_quick_links.details: Profile page shows 3 quick link cards: Weekly Menu ('View full menu'), Wallet ('Credits & balance'), Support ('Get help'). All links properly styled with colored icons.

bottom_tab_bar.details: Bottom tab bar shows only 3 tabs: Home, Plans, Profile. Menu/Wallet/Support tabs are correctly hidden using href: null in _layout.tsx.

meal_card_display.details: Meal cards show: meal name, description, Vegetarian badge, delivery time, Skip/Locked status. Proper styling with maroon/gold theme.

subscription_status.details: Subscription status card shows 'Eco Plan' with 'Active' badge and delivery address.
